Podme – Enter your podcast bubble

Podme is a subscription-based podcast platform offering exclusive content across multiple markets.

I was involved early on, contributing from initial concept through to the first app release. I later returned to help scale the product as it grew from 50,000 to nearly 400,000 subscribers across Sweden, Norway, and Finland, while also reaching profitability.

My focus was on systematising the product through a design system, improving consistency across iOS, Android, and web. I also supported marketing and CRM with reusable components and built a toolkit for launching campaign pages efficiently and contributed on the web and structures.

During this time, the platform expanded into audiobooks, adding new complexity to the product.
